Localization.Description: Attempt to delete a database backup

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is deleting a backup of the {event_src.subsys} service database on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} deleted a backup of the {event_src.subsys} service database on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete a backup of the {event_src.subsys} service database on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
